creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Build fails with GCC 14. This blocks GCC_DEFAULT update to GCC 14.

checking whether the C compiler (gcc14 -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc14 -fno-strict-aliasing   -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,-rpath=/usr/local/lib/gcc14 -L/usr/local/lib/gcc14 ) works... no
configure: error: installation or configuration problem: C compiler cannot create executables.
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.

Full log: https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/gohan04/data/140amd64-default-foo/2024-08-29_19h57m48s/logs/errors/shaaft-0.5.0_27.log

Useful link: https://gcc.gnu.org/gcc-14/porting_to.html
